description: AppTemplate (OBJ04) instances — immutable scaffold definitions that CAN_HYDRATE into deployed containers. Stratum S1 (schema) or S2 (deployed config). mutable:false per ontology.

entries.label: mo:os Go Kernel Service
entries.description: Canonical Wave-0 Go kernel template. Pure catamorphism core + effect shell + HTTP transport. Materialized from this template to produce platform/kernel.

notes: AppTemplate instances are mutable:false (ontology constraint). Enrichment via MUTATE requires ontology waiver. Add new templates as new entries — do not mutate existing ones.
